Sql.TotalVisits: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visit v WHERE v.visitdate = ?
Sql.UniquePatients: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v WHERE v.visitdate = ?
Sql.ChronicFollowups: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucode, v.visitno) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND (d.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' OR d.diagcode REGEXP '^I1[0-5]')
Sql.NcdDmPatients: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND d.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]'
Sql.NcdHtPatients: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND d.diagcode REGEXP '^I1[0-5]'
Sql.NcdDmHtPatients: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND (d.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' OR d.diagcode REGEXP '^I1[0-5]')
Sql.NcdBpScreened: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND (NULLIF(TRIM(v.pressure), '') IS NOT NULL OR NULLIF(TRIM(v.pressure2), '') IS NOT NULL)
Sql.NcdFbsScreened: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT x.pid) FROM (SELECT CAST(s.pid AS CHAR) AS pid FROM ncd_person_ncd_screen s WHERE s.screen_date = ? AND s.bsl IS NOT NULL AND s.bsl > 0 UNION SELECT CAST(l.pid AS CHAR) AS pid FROM ncdlab l WHERE l.date_serv = DATE_FORMAT(?, '%Y%m%d') AND (l.testname LIKE '%FBS%' OR l.testname LIKE '%FAST%' OR l.testname LIKE '%SUGAR%' OR l.labstdcode IN ('0531101', '0531102'))) x
Sql.MissingDiagnosis: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visit v LEFT JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND d.visitno IS NULL
Sql.AncVisits: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visitanc a WHERE a.datecheck = ?
Sql.VaccineVisits: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visitepi e WHERE e.dateepi = ?
Sql.HomeVisits: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT h.pcucode, h.visitno) FROM visithomehealthindividual h JOIN visit v ON v.pcucode = h.pcucode AND v.visitno = h.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ?
Sql.ReferOut: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visitrefer r WHERE DATE(r.datetimerefer) = ?
Sql.EmergencyCases: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visit v WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND v.typein = '4'
Sql.DiseaseDyslipidemia: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND d.diagcode REGEXP '^E78'
Sql.DiseaseVapingLungInjury: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND (d.diagcode REGEXP '^U07\\.0' OR d.diagcode REGEXP '^J68\\.0' OR d.diagcode REGEXP '^J69\\.1')
Sql.DiseaseCoronaryArtery: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND d.diagcode REGEXP '^I2[0-5]'
Sql.DiseaseStroke: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND d.diagcode REGEXP '^I6[0-9]'
Sql.DiseaseMentalHealth: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND d.diagcode REGEXP '^F[0-9][0-9]'
Sql.DiseaseCancer: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND (d.diagcode REGEXP '^C[0-9][0-9]' OR d.diagcode REGEXP '^D0[0-9]' OR d.diagcode REGEXP '^D[1-3][0-9]' OR d.diagcode REGEXP '^D4[0-8]')
Sql.DiseaseDiabetes: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND d.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]'
Sql.DiseasePertussis: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND d.diagcode REGEXP '^A37'
Sql.DiseaseHypertension: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND d.diagcode REGEXP '^I1[0-5]'
Sql.DiseaseCopdEmphysema: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND (d.diagcode REGEXP '^J43' OR d.diagcode REGEXP '^J44')
Sql.PingpongBlack: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN has_complication = 1 THEN 'black' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) >= 183 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) >= 180 THEN 'red' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 155 AND 182 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) BETWEEN 160 AND 179 THEN 'orange' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 126 AND 154 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) BETWEEN 140 AND 159 THEN 'yellow' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 100 AND 125 THEN 'green' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 9999) < 100 AND COALESCE(max_sbp, 9999) < 120 THEN 'white' ELSE NULL END AS color_key FROM (SELECT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid, MAX(CASE WHEN s.bsl IS NOT NULL AND s.bsl > 0 THEN CAST(s.bsl AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END) AS max_fbs, MAX(CASE WHEN TRIM(v.pressure) REGEXP '^[0-9]+(/[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(v.pressure), '/', 1) AS UNSIGNED) WHEN TRIM(v.pressure2) REGEXP '^[0-9]+(/[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(v.pressure2), '/', 1) AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END) AS max_sbp, MAX(CASE WHEN dg.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]\\.[2-8]' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^N18' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^N08' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^H36' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^L97' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^I7[0-9]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_complication FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag dm ON dm.pcucode = v.pcucode AND dm.visitno = v.visitno AND dm.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' LEFT JOIN visitdiag dg ON dg.pcucode = v.pcucode AND dg.visitno = v.visitno LEFT JOIN ncd_person_ncd_screen s ON s.pid = v.pid AND s.screen_date = v.visitdate WHERE v.visitdate = ? GROUP BY v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) classified) c WHERE c.color_key = 'black'
Sql.PingpongRed: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN has_complication = 1 THEN 'black' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) >= 183 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) >= 180 THEN 'red' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 155 AND 182 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) BETWEEN 160 AND 179 THEN 'orange' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 126 AND 154 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) BETWEEN 140 AND 159 THEN 'yellow' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 100 AND 125 THEN 'green' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 9999) < 100 AND COALESCE(max_sbp, 9999) < 120 THEN 'white' ELSE NULL END AS color_key FROM (SELECT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid, MAX(CASE WHEN s.bsl IS NOT NULL AND s.bsl > 0 THEN CAST(s.bsl AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END) AS max_fbs, MAX(CASE WHEN TRIM(v.pressure) REGEXP '^[0-9]+(/[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(v.pressure), '/', 1) AS UNSIGNED) WHEN TRIM(v.pressure2) REGEXP '^[0-9]+(/[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(v.pressure2), '/', 1) AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END) AS max_sbp, MAX(CASE WHEN dg.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]\\.[2-8]' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^N18' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^N08' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^H36' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^L97' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^I7[0-9]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_complication FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag dm ON dm.pcucode = v.pcucode AND dm.visitno = v.visitno AND dm.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' LEFT JOIN visitdiag dg ON dg.pcucode = v.pcucode AND dg.visitno = v.visitno LEFT JOIN ncd_person_ncd_screen s ON s.pid = v.pid AND s.screen_date = v.visitdate WHERE v.visitdate = ? GROUP BY v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) classified) c WHERE c.color_key = 'red'
Sql.PingpongOrange: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN has_complication = 1 THEN 'black' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) >= 183 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) >= 180 THEN 'red' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 155 AND 182 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) BETWEEN 160 AND 179 THEN 'orange' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 126 AND 154 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) BETWEEN 140 AND 159 THEN 'yellow' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 100 AND 125 THEN 'green' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 9999) < 100 AND COALESCE(max_sbp, 9999) < 120 THEN 'white' ELSE NULL END AS color_key FROM (SELECT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid, MAX(CASE WHEN s.bsl IS NOT NULL AND s.bsl > 0 THEN CAST(s.bsl AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END) AS max_fbs, MAX(CASE WHEN TRIM(v.pressure) REGEXP '^[0-9]+(/[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(v.pressure), '/', 1) AS UNSIGNED) WHEN TRIM(v.pressure2) REGEXP '^[0-9]+(/[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(v.pressure2), '/', 1) AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END) AS max_sbp, MAX(CASE WHEN dg.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]\\.[2-8]' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^N18' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^N08' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^H36' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^L97' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^I7[0-9]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_complication FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag dm ON dm.pcucode = v.pcucode AND dm.visitno = v.visitno AND dm.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' LEFT JOIN visitdiag dg ON dg.pcucode = v.pcucode AND dg.visitno = v.visitno LEFT JOIN ncd_person_ncd_screen s ON s.pid = v.pid AND s.screen_date = v.visitdate WHERE v.visitdate = ? GROUP BY v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) classified) c WHERE c.color_key = 'orange'
Sql.PingpongYellow: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN has_complication = 1 THEN 'black' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) >= 183 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) >= 180 THEN 'red' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 155 AND 182 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) BETWEEN 160 AND 179 THEN 'orange' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 126 AND 154 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) BETWEEN 140 AND 159 THEN 'yellow' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 100 AND 125 THEN 'green' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 9999) < 100 AND COALESCE(max_sbp, 9999) < 120 THEN 'white' ELSE NULL END AS color_key FROM (SELECT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid, MAX(CASE WHEN s.bsl IS NOT NULL AND s.bsl > 0 THEN CAST(s.bsl AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END) AS max_fbs, MAX(CASE WHEN TRIM(v.pressure) REGEXP '^[0-9]+(/[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(v.pressure), '/', 1) AS UNSIGNED) WHEN TRIM(v.pressure2) REGEXP '^[0-9]+(/[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(v.pressure2), '/', 1) AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END) AS max_sbp, MAX(CASE WHEN dg.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]\\.[2-8]' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^N18' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^N08' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^H36' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^L97' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^I7[0-9]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_complication FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag dm ON dm.pcucode = v.pcucode AND dm.visitno = v.visitno AND dm.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' LEFT JOIN visitdiag dg ON dg.pcucode = v.pcucode AND dg.visitno = v.visitno LEFT JOIN ncd_person_ncd_screen s ON s.pid = v.pid AND s.screen_date = v.visitdate WHERE v.visitdate = ? GROUP BY v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) classified) c WHERE c.color_key = 'yellow'
Sql.PingpongGreen: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN has_complication = 1 THEN 'black' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) >= 183 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) >= 180 THEN 'red' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 155 AND 182 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) BETWEEN 160 AND 179 THEN 'orange' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 126 AND 154 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) BETWEEN 140 AND 159 THEN 'yellow' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 100 AND 125 THEN 'green' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 9999) < 100 AND COALESCE(max_sbp, 9999) < 120 THEN 'white' ELSE NULL END AS color_key FROM (SELECT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid, MAX(CASE WHEN s.bsl IS NOT NULL AND s.bsl > 0 THEN CAST(s.bsl AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END) AS max_fbs, MAX(CASE WHEN TRIM(v.pressure) REGEXP '^[0-9]+(/[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(v.pressure), '/', 1) AS UNSIGNED) WHEN TRIM(v.pressure2) REGEXP '^[0-9]+(/[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(v.pressure2), '/', 1) AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END) AS max_sbp, MAX(CASE WHEN dg.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]\\.[2-8]' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^N18' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^N08' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^H36' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^L97' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^I7[0-9]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_complication FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag dm ON dm.pcucode = v.pcucode AND dm.visitno = v.visitno AND dm.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' LEFT JOIN visitdiag dg ON dg.pcucode = v.pcucode AND dg.visitno = v.visitno LEFT JOIN ncd_person_ncd_screen s ON s.pid = v.pid AND s.screen_date = v.visitdate WHERE v.visitdate = ? GROUP BY v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) classified) c WHERE c.color_key = 'green'
Sql.PingpongWhite: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN has_complication = 1 THEN 'black' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) >= 183 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) >= 180 THEN 'red' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 155 AND 182 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) BETWEEN 160 AND 179 THEN 'orange' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 126 AND 154 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) BETWEEN 140 AND 159 THEN 'yellow' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 100 AND 125 THEN 'green' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 9999) < 100 AND COALESCE(max_sbp, 9999) < 120 THEN 'white' ELSE NULL END AS color_key FROM (SELECT v.pcucodeperson, v.pid, MAX(CASE WHEN s.bsl IS NOT NULL AND s.bsl > 0 THEN CAST(s.bsl AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END) AS max_fbs, MAX(CASE WHEN TRIM(v.pressure) REGEXP '^[0-9]+(/[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(v.pressure), '/', 1) AS UNSIGNED) WHEN TRIM(v.pressure2) REGEXP '^[0-9]+(/[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(v.pressure2), '/', 1) AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END) AS max_sbp, MAX(CASE WHEN dg.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]\\.[2-8]' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^N18' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^N08' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^H36' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^L97' OR dg.diagcode REGEXP '^I7[0-9]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_complication FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag dm ON dm.pcucode = v.pcucode AND dm.visitno = v.visitno AND dm.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' LEFT JOIN visitdiag dg ON dg.pcucode = v.pcucode AND dg.visitno = v.visitno LEFT JOIN ncd_person_ncd_screen s ON s.pid = v.pid AND s.screen_date = v.visitdate WHERE v.visitdate = ? GROUP BY v.pcucodeperson, v.pid) classified) c WHERE c.color_key = 'white'
Sql.NcdHouseLocations: SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT(v.pcucodeperson, ':', v.pid) AS patient_key, v.pcucodeperson AS pcucodeperson, v.pid AS pid, CASE WHEN d.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' THEN 'DM' WHEN d.diagcode REGEXP '^I1[0-5]' THEN 'HT' ELSE 'NCD' END AS disease_group, colored.color_key, CAST(TRIM(h.xgis) AS DECIMAL(10,7)) AS latitude, CAST(TRIM(h.ygis) AS DECIMAL(10,7)) AS longitude FROM visit v JOIN visitdiag d ON d.pcucode = v.pcucode AND d.visitno = v.visitno JOIN person p ON p.pcucodeperson = v.pcucodeperson AND p.pid = v.pid JOIN house h ON h.pcucode = p.pcucodeperson AND h.hcode = p.hcode LEFT JOIN (SELECT report_date, patient_key, CASE WHEN has_complication = 1 THEN 'black' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) >= 183 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) >= 180 THEN 'red' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 155 AND 182 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) BETWEEN 160 AND 179 THEN 'orange' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 126 AND 154 OR COALESCE(max_sbp, 0) BETWEEN 140 AND 159 THEN 'yellow' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 0) BETWEEN 100 AND 125 THEN 'green' WHEN COALESCE(max_fbs, 9999) < 100 AND COALESCE(max_sbp, 9999) < 120 THEN 'white' ELSE NULL END AS color_key FROM (SELECT v2.visitdate AS report_date, CONCAT(v2.pcucodeperson, ':', v2.pid) AS patient_key, MAX(CASE WHEN s.bsl IS NOT NULL AND s.bsl > 0 THEN CAST(s.bsl AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END) AS max_fbs, MAX(CASE WHEN TRIM(v2.pressure) REGEXP '^[0-9]+(/[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(v2.pressure), '/', 1) AS UNSIGNED) WHEN TRIM(v2.pressure2) REGEXP '^[0-9]+(/[0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(v2.pressure2), '/', 1) AS UNSIGNED) ELSE NULL END) AS max_sbp, MAX(CASE WHEN dg2.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]\\.[2-8]' OR dg2.diagcode REGEXP '^N18' OR dg2.diagcode REGEXP '^N08' OR dg2.diagcode REGEXP '^H36' OR dg2.diagcode REGEXP '^L97' OR dg2.diagcode REGEXP '^I7[0-9]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_complication FROM visit v2 JOIN visitdiag dm2 ON dm2.pcucode = v2.pcucode AND dm2.visitno = v2.visitno AND dm2.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' LEFT JOIN visitdiag dg2 ON dg2.pcucode = v2.pcucode AND dg2.visitno = v2.visitno LEFT JOIN ncd_person_ncd_screen s ON s.pid = v2.pid AND s.screen_date = v2.visitdate WHERE v2.visitdate = ? GROUP BY v2.visitdate, v2.pcucodeperson, v2.pid) patient_day) colored ON colored.report_date = v.visitdate AND colored.patient_key = CONCAT(v.pcucodeperson, ':', v.pid) WHERE v.visitdate = ? AND (d.diagcode REGEXP '^E1[0-4]' OR d.diagcode REGEXP '^I1[0-5]') AND TRIM(h.xgis) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' AND TRIM(h.ygis) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' AND CAST(TRIM(h.xgis) AS DECIMAL(10,7)) BETWEEN 5 AND 21 AND CAST(TRIM(h.ygis) AS DECIMAL(10,7)) BETWEEN 97 AND 106
